article.title: 5 abandoned Android launchers I wish were still alive today
article.summary: I’d argue that the Android launcher space is the healthiest it has been in decades. Even though contenders like Nova Launcher are no longer considered the pinnacle for many, a slew of others focusing on various use cases and filling multiple niches are available. Think of Octopi Launcher for its fluidity and support for multiple screen devices and layouts, Kvaesitso for a launcher that’s built with search first and foremost, Niagara Launcher for those who require a stripped-down yet visually engaging experience, or Lawnchair for an open-source taste of Pixel Launcher. And I’m genuinely just skimming the surface of a very deep pool.
article.title_zh: 5 個我希望仍然活著的已廢棄 Android 啟動器
article.summary_zh: 雖然 Nova Launcher 等競爭對手不再是許多人的首選，但 Android 啟動器生態系統現在擁有專注於各種用例的多個選項。

article.title: UK to Ban Social Media for Under-16s Starting Next Year
article.summary: Big tech companies design their products to maximize user attention, often without regard to whether the content is beneficial, especially for children. Beeban Kidron, author of 'Users,' joins Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss with hosts David Gura and Christina Ruffini the need for government intervention to regulate product design, parental responsibility in managing usage, and consumer awareness to make informed choices in the attention economy. (Source: Bloomberg)
article.title_zh: 英國將從明年開始禁止 16 歲以下青少年使用社群媒體
article.summary_zh: 大型科技公司設計產品時著重於最大化用戶關注度，往往忽視內容是否對兒童有益，政府干預變得越來越必要。

article.title: Dramatically redesigned GMKtec EVO-X3 shown bearing Lisa Su’s signature of approval — flagship AI mini PC workstation is built around AMD’s Ryzen AI Max+ 395 'Strix Halo' processor, again
article.summary: GMKtec's dramatically redesigned EVO-X3 'Strix Halo' Mini PC gets Lisa Su’s signature of approval.

article.summary_zh: GMKtec 大幅重新設計的 EVO-X3 'Strix Halo' Mini PC 獲得 Lisa Su 的簽名認可。

article.title: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot dies in plane crash —  French publisher established in 1986 became one of the biggest entertainment companies in the world
article.summary: Ubisoft co-founder Claude Guillemot was killed when his twin-engine private plane crashed enroute to an airshow. Aside from building the French gaming empire, Guillemot was also a licensed and avid pilot.
article.title_zh: Ubisoft 聯合創辦人 Claude Guillemot 在飛機失事中喪生 — 1986 年成立的法國發行商成為全球最大娛樂公司之一
article.summary_zh: Ubisoft 聯合創辦人 Claude Guillemot 駕駛雙引擎私人飛機前往飛行表演時失事身亡；除了創建法國遊戲帝國外，Guillemot 還是持證飛行員與熱情飛行愛好者。

article.title: Your agent wants to search like a 2010 quant
article.summary: AI agents need the right information to work well. Whether they manage to find it is the difference between success and failure in most real-world cases, and increasingly so as models get smarter. The practitioners in the field of letting large language models find the information they need have passed through several stages of enlightenment.  The first stage was the vector database period of ’24, when the belief was that all you needed to do was chop text into independent chunks, create an embedding vector for each, and retrieve them via a nearest-neighbor search. This was simple, but alas, it did not work well. Chunks had too little context, and scoring based solely on vector similarity failed to reliably surface useful information.  Enter the second stage , where the lea
article.title_zh: 你的 AI 代理想要像 2010 年的量化交易員一樣搜索
article.summary_zh: AI 代理需要正確的信息才能有效運作，信息檢索能力對於大多數現實案例的成功至關重要，並隨著模型變得更智能而變得越來越重要。

article.title: Taiwanese Brothers Amass $1 Billion From Boom in Display Chips
article.summary: Biing-seng Wu has spent most of his career developing tiny chips that tell pixels on flat-screen displays how and when to light up.
article.title_zh: 台灣兄弟從顯示晶片繁榮中累積 10 億美元
article.summary_zh: Biing-seng Wu 在其職業生涯中大部分時間都在開發微小晶片，這些晶片告訴平面顯示器上的像素如何及何時亮起。

article.title: Beyond Siri: Here are the practical AI features coming to your iPhone in iOS 27
article.summary: Siri’s AI overhaul may have grabbed the headlines at WWDC, but some of Apple’s most useful AI features are arriving elsewhere in iOS 27.
article.title_zh: 超越 Siri：iOS 27 中即將推出的實用 AI 功能
article.summary_zh: Siri 的 AI 改造在 WWDC 上獲得了關注，但 Apple 最實用的一些 AI 功能將在 iOS 27 的其他地方推出。

article.title: Get AMD's flagship Ryzen 7 9800X3D with 32GB of DDR5 memory and an MSI B850 Wi-Fi 7 motherboard at a discount — Micro Center bundles are now available on Amazon
article.summary: Micro Center is now selling some of its bundles on Amazon, including this 9800X3D combo that gives you an excellent motherboard and fast RAM without breaking the bank.

article.title: Cloudflare推出臨時帳號加速AI代理人部署作業
article.summary: AI代理人大量自動化開發工作，卻常在部署時卡住，為此Cloudflare上周公佈臨時Cloudflare帳號（Temporary Cloudflare Account）的服務，不必註冊Cloudflare帳號就能直接部署應用程式。
